programme.title: Chalo Dilli
programme.desc: Mihika, an investment banker, misses her flight to Delhi and meets Manu Gupta, a talkative man. In order to reach Delhi on time, she must tag along with Manu and put up with his antics.

programme.title: I, Me Aur Main
programme.desc: Aarush, Al and Tanmay, three womanisers get the shock of their life when they find a baby girl at their doorstep claiming to be the daughter of one of them. As they try to find her mother, they discover an unexplored side of their own personality.

programme.title: Shor In The City
programme.desc: A film set in Mumbai, India. The movie revolves around the lives of three men who get caught up in the chaos of the city. The first story follows two small-time crooks who attempt to pull off a heist. The second story focuses on a struggling cricketer who gets caught up in a web of corruption. The third story is about a young couple trying to find their way in the chaotic city. As their lives intersect, they must navigate through the noisy and bustling streets of Mumbai to find their own paths.

programme.title: Mickey Virus
programme.desc: Two police officers approach a street smart hacker, Mickey Arora, to help them solve a case. Mickey, along with his friends sets out to crack the case and unravels a complex web of deceit, conspiracy, and danger.

programme.title: Bollywood Movie
programme.desc: The Movie Club provides Bollywood films, popular Indian movies, and general entertainment programming.
